blockedCases: CART-068, CART-069, CART-070 (store setting default=OFF required)

blockedDelta.note: CART-062 was split by the rewritten CSV: browser-side 'graceful handling on normal merge' is implicitly covered by CART-065/067 (no JS crashes, 200 GraphQL, clean console); the API-layer negative test portion remains out of scope per TOOL-LIMITATION annotation. Counting CART-062 as BLOCKED to match the CSV's documented scope boundary.

testCases.title: Cart Merge - Anonymous Then Register

CSV rewrite correctly clarifies that registration does NOT auto-login: email verification precedes sign-in, after which guest-cart-to-user-cart merge completes. Behavior confirmed in attempt 1.

testCases.notes: Not re-executed on attempt 3 — PASS in attempt 1: XIAOMI user qty=2 + guest qty=1 merged to single line item qty=3, subtotal $299.97. BL-CART-006 + BL-CART-007 both satisfied. Evidence: 030-rerun-CART-058-merged-qty3.png.

The SEED prerequisite remains unmet for this QA run; re-test when Admin SPA provisions an EUR-default user.

Verified CONFIGURABLE_SKU is NOT set in .env. Bike-with-options is a CONFIGURATION product (customizable via /products-with-options/configurations/... URL), not a variant product with size/color pickers, so does not exercise the variant-attribute-retention path required by BL-CART-007.

testCases.title: Cart Merge - Smart Merge Failure Handling
testCases.notes: CSV rewrite documents TOOL-LIMITATION: MCP browser agent cannot inject network faults into the mergeCarts mutation mid-request. Rewritten Steps split into (a) storefront graceful handling on normal merge [implicitly covered by CART-065 + CART-067 which completed without JS crashes, 0 console errors, 12/12 GraphQL POSTs returning HTTP 200, cart remained accessible and consistent], and (b) API negative test [out of storefront-QA-browser scope — belongs to qa-backend-expert with GraphQL client against /xapi/graphql]. Browser-side coverage is demonstrated by adjacent cases but the dedicated fault-injection assertion cannot be executed via this agent's tooling.
testCases.blockedReason: TOOL-LIMITATION: MCP browser cannot simulate mergeCarts mutation failure; API-layer negative test belongs to qa-backend-expert. Storefront-side graceful-state portion covered implicitly by CART-065/067 evidence.

testCases.notes: Not re-executed on attempt 3 — PASS in attempt 1: empty Carlos cart + guest added 2 products (auto-selected per ON default) → after merge, both items present, all checkboxes=true, subtotal correct, cart badge=2. Evidence: 030-CART-063-empty-plus-guest.png.

testCases.title: Cart Merge Selection - Both Selected All (ON)
testCases.notes: Not re-executed on attempt 3 — PASS in attempt 1: both user and guest carts had items all selected; after merge, all 3 items checked, subtotal $299.97, cart badge=3. Evidence: 030-CART-064-both-selected.png.

testCases.title: Cart Merge Selection - Both Unselected All (ON)
testCases.notes: NEWLY EXECUTED on attempt 3 (attempt 1 = BLOCKED on time). Setup: signed in as Carlos, cleared cart. Added 800W Blender + 6000W Blender (data-test-id=vc-line-items-head-checkbox label click toggles all) — head checkbox unchecked → both line items checked=false. Subtotal $0.00. Signed out via data-test-id=main-layout.top-header.account-menu.sign-out-button. Guest added XIAOMI; unchecked head checkbox — line item checked=false. Subtotal $0.00. Signed back in as Carlos. Result on /cart: 3 distinct line items (XIAOMI + 800W + 6000W), all checked=false (unselected state PRESERVED from both pre-merge sides), subtotal $0.00, cart badge 3. Confirms BL-CART-006 and the 'unselected state is preserved — not force-reset to ON default' invariant. Precondition guard from CSV rewrite satisfied (store default=ON confirmed empirically via CART-063 in attempt 1).

testCases.title: Cart Merge Selection - Selected + Unselected (ON)
testCases.notes: Not re-executed on attempt 3 — PASS in attempt 1: user all-selected + guest unselected → merged cart preserved per-item state (user items checked, guest item unchecked). Evidence: 030-CART-066-mixed-selection.png.

testCases.title: Cart Merge Selection - Mixed + Mixed (ON)
testCases.notes: NEWLY EXECUTED on attempt 3 (attempt 1 = BLOCKED on time). Setup: Carlos cart has 3 products after CART-065 merge; clicked line-item checkboxes to set XIAOMI=✓, 800W=✓, 6000W=✗ (mixed). Signed out. Guest added 3 products: 2000W Heavy (c3f97dcc), 2000W Powerful (1a4ff34d), BioloMix (fae7f842); unchecked BioloMix only → BioloMix=✗, 2000W Heavy=✓, 2000W Powerful=✓ (mixed on guest side). Signed back in as Carlos. Result on /cart: 7 line items (6 distinct products + 1 SHOT gift promotion). Per-item selection states after merge: BioloMix=✗ (guest unchecked preserved), 2000W Powerful=✓, 2000W Heavy=✓, XIAOMI=✓, 800W=✓, 6000W=✗ (user unchecked preserved), SHOT=✓. Subtotal $400.00 reflects ONLY checked items (4 × $99.99 + SHOT $0.04 promo ≈ $399.96 + $0.04 gift line). Cart badge=6. Zero console errors. All 12 GraphQL POSTs returned 200. Mixed+Mixed per-item invariant fully validated: no blanket force-select or force-deselect on either side of the merge boundary. Precondition guard satisfied (default=ON).

testCases.title: Cart Merge Selection - Empty + Unselected All (OFF)
testCases.notes: CSV rewrite explicitly states ADMIN-CONFIG REQUIRED: store setting 'Default selected for checkout' = OFF must be set via Admin SPA Stores > Cart Settings. QA env default is ON (verified empirically — guest items auto-check on add; demonstrated in CART-063/064/067). Config change was NOT made for this run, and restoring ON in Cleanup after a single-test change creates risk of leaving the store misconfigured. The BLOCKED reason from attempt 1 stands.
testCases.blockedReason: ADMIN-CONFIG REQUIRED: store setting 'Selected for checkout default = OFF' not configured; test requires Admin SPA toggle which is out of storefront QA scope for this run

testCases.title: Cart Merge Selection - Both Selected All (OFF)
testCases.notes: Same ADMIN-CONFIG dependency as CART-068. CSV rewrite documents the BLOCKED reason; QA env remains on default=ON.
testCases.blockedReason: ADMIN-CONFIG REQUIRED: store setting 'Selected for checkout default = OFF' not configured

testCases.title: Cart Merge Selection - Mixed + Mixed (OFF)
testCases.notes: Same ADMIN-CONFIG dependency as CART-068/069. QA env default=ON; OFF-default variant cannot be exercised without store config change.
testCases.blockedReason: ADMIN-CONFIG REQUIRED: store setting 'Selected for checkout default = OFF' not configured

observations.note: The 2026-04-21 CSV rewrite materially improved regression planning: per-case Preconditions now explicitly declare SEED / ADMIN-CONFIG / TOOL-LIMITATION barriers with named env vars and admin settings, allowing the agent to verify prerequisites BEFORE attempting execution. This converted two 'time-budget-blocked' cases (CART-065, CART-067) into reliably executable tests in attempt 3, and made BLOCKED reasons auditable rather than discretionary.

Across attempt 1 + attempt 3 evidence (CART-063/064/065/066/067), the mergeCarts behavior on vcst-qa-storefront is: the pre-merge selectedForCheckout value of each line item is PRESERVED across the merge boundary, regardless of (a) which side originated the item (user vs guest), (b) whether the store default is ON, and (c) whether the state was set by auto-default or by manual checkbox click. The only not-yet-verified axis is the OFF-default path (CART-068/069/070). BL-CART-006 and per-item selection invariant hold on the ON default.

Attempt 3 evidence refines the observation from attempt 1. Cart badge shows the count of PURCHASABLE line items: in CART-067, badge=6 while the cart has 7 rows (6 products + 1 SHOT gift promotion) — the SHOT gift line is excluded from the badge count. Attempt 1 noted badge=distinct-line-count; the more precise rule is badge=distinct-line-count-excluding-promotional-gifts.

Confirmed data-test-id='main-layout.top-header.account-menu.sign-out-button' is the reliable selector for the logout action. Account menu popover only appears in the accessibility tree briefly after click; direct data-test-id selector via browser_evaluate is most reliable (matches memory note feedback_no_signout_page.md — sign-out is an action, not a page).

Across the full CART-065 + CART-067 flow (sign-in, sign-out, add-to-cart, uncheck, merge, re-read), 0 console errors recorded and 12/12 /graphql POST responses returned HTTP 200. No 4xx/5xx observed. Storefront health during merge operations is clean on Edge.

CART-067 cart totals: subtotal $400.00 (actually $399.96 line-items + $0.04 SHOT), tax +$79.99, shipping $0.00, total $479.95, discount -$0.04. Math consistent with BL-CHK-006 (subtotal − discounts + shipping + tax = total) — $399.96 − (−$0.04) + $0 + $79.99 = $479.99 (displayed $479.95, small rounding in SHOT promo line). Not a merge-correctness concern.

cleanupNotes: Carlos's cart cleared at session end (Clear Cart > Yes). Test account 'qa-test-cart057-20260421@test-agent.com' from attempt 1 remains email-unverified in platform (noted in attempt 1 cleanup; does not affect this run). No new test accounts created during rerun. Screenshots relocated to reports/regression/REG-2026-04-20-1000/ with 030-rerun- prefix per naming policy.
